name: Brazilian Rare Earths Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$5.2989. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.3835 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$5.2989, stop A$4.7025, target A$5.6600. Risk/reward is 0.61:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
